texto: Human culture arises directly from how we overcome the challenges of survival. Some call culture a balance between decadence and celebration. The need for shelter becomes architecture, the rituals of fine cuisine wrought by celebrity chefs. Perhaps the most enduring are the rituals of romance. At its highest expression the artistry of love is the subject of exquisite effort. It is when we are the most human.
explicacao: Citação de David Ai sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Human culture arises directly from how we overcome the challenges of survival. Some call culture …” articula amor, culture, rituals em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como termino e rituals.
